title: An update on adverse health effects from exposure to PM2.5

L2: PM2.5 exposure increases innate immune responses including IL-6, TNF-alpha, and IFN-gamma
Respiratory tract is the primary pathway connecting the immune system and PM2.5 particles
L3: Updated review of adverse health effects from PM2.5 exposure covering respiratory, cardiovascular, neurological, and immunological impacts, including mechanistic pathways from nasal passage through airways to alveolar gas exchange units
